subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto those who have turned toward the Throne of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Say: Verily, the Throne is My Temple, and thereon is It established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للذین توجهوا الی عرش الله المهیمن القیوم قل ان العرش هیکلی و استوی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
